core_thesis: Mary operates as an esoteric-conspiratorial commentator who frames elite power structures, mass media, and social division as deliberate energy-harvesting systems targeting human consciousness. She synthesizes Jungian archetypes, Hermetic principles, and occult traditions to argue that spiritual sovereignty — reclaiming one's own energy and presence — is the primary act of resistance. Her through-line is that modernity (screens, democracy, celebrity culture, gender confusion) is engineered amnesia, and that ancient knowledge systems hold the antidote.
key_ideas: Humans as energetic batteries — attention and emotion are fuel harvested by elite systems
Polarity spell / divide and conquer — Hermetic principle of polarity weaponized to keep masses divided and energy-spent
Screens as dimensional portals — doom-scrolling as timeline-hopping that severs presence and accelerates subjective time loss
Divine masculine/feminine archetypes (Jungian) — cultural suppression of integrated masculinity and protected femininity as a destabilization mechanism
Celebrities and media as false oracles — distraction infrastructure replacing ancient mythic meaning-making
Alien narrative as psyop — UFO disclosure framed as elite-staged spectacle to redirect attention from accountability (e.g., trafficking islands)
Ancient esoteric traditions as suppressed epistemology — Hermeticism, Zoroastrianism, and archetype theory as pre-censored truth systems
Amnesia as engineered condition — post-war suburban architecture, public schooling, and digital culture as tools of collective memory erasure
